title: lappula oligacantha
intro:
Lappula oligacantha, also known as the stick-leaved stickseed, is a plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Tibetan Plateau.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Lappula oligacantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture to be used for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
